---
format:
  html:
    meta:
      viewport: "width=device-width, initial-scale=1"
      description: "Statistical modeling, simulation, and interactive data tools for applied research."
    css: index.css
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.overlay-text}
# Statistical Modeling For Applied Research


::: {.cta-row}
[View selected work](scholar.qmd){.cta-button}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.below-section}
::: {.below-inner}
## About
I work where statistical methods meet practical decisions: clinical prediction, public health surveillance, Bayesian computation, and research communication.

::: {.work-strands}
::: {.work-strand}
**Modeling**  
Traditional modeling, machine learning, and Bayesian methods for applied scientific questions.
:::

::: {.work-strand}
**Tools**  
Interactive prototypes and data products that make methods easier to use.
:::

::: {.work-strand}
**Communication**  
Talks, writing, and visuals that make technical work easier to inspect.
:::
:::
:::
:::
